plan_adherence_notes: The plan is internally consistent with the research: the decisions in plan.json map cleanly from q1-q5 and preserve the parent step boundary. Execution did not follow that plan, though. The diff from 9094b224 to HEAD contains only .fleet task artifacts and no changes to backend/server.py or tests/test_bayes_market_api.py, so the accumulator helper, regression tests, and implementation-side test run described in the plan were not completed. I ran a focused existing pytest slice for related EventTrade exposure/positions behavior and it passed, but those passing pre-existing tests do not validate the missing accumulator work.
missed_questions: Which exact numeric conditions should make a replay fill unusable for accumulator math: only missing/non-parsable values, or also zero, negative, NaN, infinity, and out-of-range probability prices?

What exact zeroed result contract should the helper return on unusable history: should averageCost and netSize both reset to 0.0 in every abort case, and should there be any signal beyond historyFound=false to distinguish 'no matching fills' from 'matching fills but invalid replay inputs'?
reason: Reject. The task objective was to implement the read-time replay accumulator in backend/server.py and add focused regressions, but this branch only adds question/research/plan artifacts. No production or test code changed for the step, so the requested work remains unimplemented even though the existing related pytest slice still passes.
